mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications ( notification_seq INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, store_seq INT NOT NULL, type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, message TEXT NOT NULL, is_read CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N', created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (store_seq, type, title, message, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{storeSeq}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{isRead}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT notification_seq AS notificationSeq, store_seq AS storeSeq, type, title, message, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt FROM notifications WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT store_seq FROM stores WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY store_seq ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT u.user_type AS userType, s.company_name AS companyName FROM stores s JOIN users u ON s.user_seq = u.user_seq WHERE s.store_seq = #{storeSeq}

SELECT CASE WHEN (uns.is_enabled = 'N' OR (#{notificationType} = 'STOCK_SHORTAGE' AND u.alert_stock_yn = 'N') OR (#{notificationType} = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND u.alert_order_yn = 'N')) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM stores s JOIN users u ON s.user_seq = u.user_seq LEFT JOIN user_notification_settings uns ON s.store_seq = uns.store_seq AND uns.notification_type = #{notificationType} AND uns.channel_type = 'WEB' WHERE s.store_seq = #{storeSeq} LIMIT 1
